chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 1243 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.7377/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.7378/2025 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of protective bail 23.12.2025 Mr. Sabir Hussain Samo, Advocate along with applicants..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. As to the office objections, learned Counsel requires time for compliance of the same. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Learned Counsel states that though the applicants are already on bail, on account of inability of presence before the relevant Court, NBWs have been issued against them. He further requires time to file copy of the bail order. For the present, however, let the NBWs issued in the matter be suspended till the 6th of January 2026 subject to applicants effecting appearance before the learned Court, which have issued the NBWs, subject to the surety in the sum of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees ten thousand) each and execution of P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Matter stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
